data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The “Bunny Chasers on Board” Event has finally begun!
Join C&C on their mission aboard a luxury cruise ship!

🗓️Period: 5/3 (Tue) – 5/17 (Tue) 03:00 AM (UTC)
